NO new ACs, NO scope changes, NO new analysis. Codex re-review SKIPPED (text alignment only, not design change).
revision_metadata.summary: Iteration 3 (text-alignment-only) realigns 3 stale Technical Hints in ticket.md + 1 stale constraint string in context.json with the iter-2 corrected M-bodies. Iteration 2 fixed 7 QA findings + 9 codex iter-2-review findings. See acceptance-criteria-20260524-205206.json revision_metadata.summary for per-finding deltas. requirement.original:
实现任意一次cycle总分加总不超过+5，也就是说每一个成功最多最多也不超过5
验证 agent 在被注入后真的会读 + 行动
用户评分 UX：其实可以了。但是现在的总结不对，总结应该把目前我提出的用时间线串起来，同时尽量精简，尽量简明扼要地概括我之前设计的几个要点
自我总结的内容质量靠 orchestrator 即兴生成：无所谓
changelog-analyst bulk-commit bug：只要用户不使用commit bulk，永久禁止使用bulk
spec-continue 触发：这个确实是一个问题，应该和commit相互联系，但是根本问题是禁止commit在用户不允许的情况下bulk
requirement.clarified: Fix-forward Cycle 4 (task 20260524-172805). Four user-need items: (M1) cycle-total positive-score cap +5 across {dev,ba,qa} per dev cycle, not per-event-per-agent. (M2) Prove agents actually read and act on score injection — JSON echo contract + static fixture test + runtime verification. (M3) /close session summary becomes a chronological timeline of user requests this session, terse, ≤15 lines, sourced from user-requirement docs. (M4) Permanently gate /commit --bulk behind a user-authorization sentinel; agents (subagents) cannot create the sentinel or the bulk-commit token via any tool channel. M5 (spec-continue) is implicit via M4.
requirement.what: Rebalance score deltas to cap cycle-total at +5; add JSON echo contract to score-inject + agent prompts + verification tests; replace 5-bucket session summary with timeline format; gate /commit --bulk behind user-authorization flag enforced at script + command + hook layers.
requirement.why: User reviewed Cycle 4 (task 20260524-172805) and identified 4 specific gaps. The scoring item was misimplemented as per-agent-max +5 rather than per-cycle-total +5. Injection has no verifiability. Session summary lacks timeline format. The bulk-commit user-only gate exists only at the SlashCommand layer (disable-model-invocation: true) but agents can still trigger bulk via other channels.

included: EVENT_DELTAS rebalance via Path A (static rebalance) ONLY — Path B accumulator REMOVED in iter 2 per OBJ-04 to eliminate spec-vs-AC drift
score-inject INJECTION_PROOF instruction in all three stdout branches
Score-injection echo contract clause in agents/{ba,dev,qa}.md
Static fixture test + runtime jq-verification for M2
Session Summary timeline template rewrite in commands/close.md
Auth-flag check in scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py with single-use unlink
Session-Stop reap of stale auth flag
Update stale qa_first_pass delta comments in commands/dev.md:897 and :1151-1152
excluded: Restructuring pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:465-488 global SID fallback (logged as out-of-scope observation)
Hook-blocking the literal text substring '--bulk' in agent text (would break specs/reports/tests)
Changing negative-delta values (user explicitly says minimum stays -40)
Adding a per-agent 'cycle gain so far' counter visible in score-inject (could-have, not required)

success_criteria: AC-01 passes: Path A static rebalance ONLY (Path B removed per OBJ-04); for EVERY positive event sum across {dev,ba,qa} <= +5; all 20 negative entries unchanged (full enumeration per OBJ-07); stale delta comments updated at dev.md:897, dev.md:898 (OBJ-06), close.md:415, close.md:416 (OBJ-06)

AC-02 passes: every score-inject stdout branch contains INJECTION_PROOF instruction citing FOUR fields (rank_acknowledged, range_acknowledged, recent_events_digest_acknowledged, score_injection_action — OBJ-01 fix); agent contracts include the 4-field echo clause + fail-safe; static fixture test exits 0; runtime QA artifact has jq-extractable values for all 4 fields, with score_injection_action being non-null + non-empty + len >= 10
AC-03 passes: Session Summary is timeline format <=15 lines with explicit user-need + design-response per entry; sourced from user-requirement doc

AC-04 passes: bulk sentinel write refused without auth flag; auth flag consumed via try/finally observation-time unlink (OBJ-05 fix); commit.md documents the gate; hook denies subagent writes to auth-flag and sentinel paths; session-Stop reaps stale flag; literal --bulk substring NOT blocked in agent text; (g.script) orchestrator-context runtime test + (g.hook) synthetic-payload hook unit test (OBJ-02 fix — split eliminates self-blocking contradiction)

AC-05 passes (NEW IN ITER 2 per OBJ-03): blocked /commit --bulk does NOT write push-gate token (Phase A); /commit <task-id> non-bulk fallback DOES fire Step 7 spec-continue (Phase B) — verified via test-mode trace env var or trace JSON marker file
constraints: Do NOT block the literal text '--bulk' in agent text writes outside the operational paths

Single-use auth flag (consumed at OBSERVATION TIME — unlink statement fires IMMEDIATELY BEFORE the sentinel-write attempt, NO try/finally wrapper; whether the subsequent sentinel-write succeeds or fails is independent of the consumption; codex finding #8 fix resolves prior context-vs-spec drift in favor of unlink-before-write semantics)
M2 runtime proof for THIS cycle applies to QA only (BA/Dev dispatched before patch)
M3 spec constrains format only; content quality is orchestrator-improvisational
Verification harness cleanup contract (R10) applies to any test that spawns background children — current tests run synchronously, contract satisfied trivially

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Global glob fallback for bulk-commit-sentinel accepts any valid sentinel across SIDs (codex finding). Not in this cycle's user-need scope; the M4 auth-flag gate closes the immediate threat because no sentinel can be written without user authorization in the first place. A future cycle may want to bind sentinel acceptance to a specific authorized SID for defense-in-depth.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Cycle 4 (task 20260524-172805) shipped per-agent-max +5 not per-cycle-total +5; score injection runs but agent consumption is unverified; session summary is free-form 5 buckets; /commit --bulk has only SlashCommand-layer gating which agents bypass.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Cycle 4 misread the user's '+5' directive as per-event-per-agent rather than per-cycle-total. Score injection was never given an echo contract, so agents may or may not consume it without observable proof. Session summary template was free-form by design and the user now wants a timeline. /commit --bulk relied solely on frontmatter disable-model-invocation:true which only blocks one of several agent-accessible invocation channels.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: Cycle 4 commits (aea75d9 / 5771880 / af96c61 / 1a1d058 / 50f2ca2) — most recent harness-touching commits; specifically the scoring rebalance commits from task 20260524-172805.
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: User's original wording in Cycle 4 ("加分太严重了，应该是最好的分数是+5，最差的分数是-40") was ambiguous and BA interpreted '+5' as per-event delta maximum.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Cycle TOTAL can still reach +9 to +15 across {dev,ba,qa}; user intends a tighter cap so a single cycle cannot push scores by more than +5 in aggregate.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Cycle 4 (task 20260524-172805) shipped 2026-05-24 morning; user reviewed in evening session and identified 4 fix-forward gaps; this cycle is the corrective cycle.
observations: scripts/score-inject.sh:38-43, 67-75, 104-106 — three stdout branches without echo contract (inferred: Read)
commands/commit.md:79-83 — BULK=true sentinel write with no auth check (inferred: Read)
scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:68-83 — main() writes sentinel without auth flag check (inferred: Read)

codex finding 7 — settings.json:63-75,139-141 currently allow Bash(touch:*) and Write(/tmp/**) for subagents, making the auth flag forgeable without hook enforcement (observed: codex review of settings.json)
user requirement verbatim Chinese stated in this session prompt (observed: user input)
root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: complete (combined: user verbatim + Read of all five named files + codex review of cross-cutting hook/settings impact)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: All four user-need items map to specific files and line ranges read during BA analysis (see affected_files + observations). Codex consultation surfaced hook-level enforcement gaps that the BA's initial draft would have missed.
root_cause_analysis.located_source: scripts/score-update.sh:84-98 (M1); scripts/score-inject.sh:38-105 (M2); commands/close.md:421-431 (M3); scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:68-83 + commands/commit.md:28-90 + hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh + hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh + hooks/stop-cleanup-allowlist.sh (M4).

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: Not a regression bug — user requirement is a forward enhancement / re-specification of Cycle 4's intent. The 'regression keywords' (was working / broke) are absent; the user is refining the spec, not reporting a regression.

diagnosis_layer: L3+L4 (data values for M1 deltas; logic for M2 contract, M3 template, M4 enforcement)

requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: AC-05 (NEW in iter 2 per OBJ-03 + codex finding #5 fix). Replaces iter-1's 'collapsed into R6 / implicit via AC-04' classification — direct read of commands/commit.md:176-181 confirmed Step 7 SKIPS when BULK=true, so the implication chain needs explicit verification. AC-05 Phase A verifies blocked-bulk fires no Step-7 marker; Phase B verifies non-bulk fallback fires the Step-7 marker via real end-to-end commit chain (codex finding #3 — no stubbed Phase B).

component_chain.role: EVENT_DELTAS dict — the data table that determines per-event score deltas
Emits prompt-injection text block consumed by /dev orchestrator to prepend into agent dispatch prompts
component_chain.evidence: Read scripts/score-inject.sh entire file; grep -n 'score-inject' commands/dev.md returned three dispatch sites

component_chain.role: Orchestrator dispatch templates that prepend score-inject output to each agent prompt
Writes the bulk-commit sentinel JSON that pretool-git-privilege-guard.py reads to authorize auto-bulk: commits
Step 1 argument parsing + Step 5 sentinel write — the BULK=true authorization path
Session self-summary template emitted before user rating options block
Agent prompt files where the Score-injection echo contract clause must be inserted
component_chain.imports_from: leaf (each receives the dispatch prompt assembled by commands/dev.md)
component_chain.evidence: wc -l confirmed sizes; no existing rank_acknowledged or Rank: text

component_chain.role: Pretool guards that deny subagent writes to /tmp/claude-bulk-* paths, plus session-Stop hook that reaps stale auth flag
component_chain.imports_from: leaf (settings.json registers them as PreToolUse / Stop matchers)
component_chain.evidence: git status shows hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh and hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh are already touched in this branch; settings.json registers them per existing infra

pre_existing_guards.purpose: Refuses to write sentinel if CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is not set
Blocks SlashCommand-layer self-invocation by the model
Accepts any valid bulk-commit sentinel even when SID does not match (existing fallback for subagent SID mismatch)

setup.reason: non-UI -- CLI script + agent-prompt edit + hook edit + command (markdown) edit; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered UI code paths

evidence.observed: User verbatim Chinese requirement listing 4 gaps in Cycle 4 (task 20260524-172805) completion; codex adversarial review surfaced hook-level enforcement gaps and JSON-shape correctness issues.

measured.value: EVENT_DELTAS cycle-total max = +11 across {dev,ba,qa} for close_success_qa_pass alone; +15 when combined with qa_first_pass+user_rating_5; INJECTION_PROOF absent from all three score-inject.sh stdout branches; /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-* path is unguarded by hooks; session summary is 5-bucket free-form at commands/close.md:421-431

expected.value: Cycle-total max = +5 across {dev,ba,qa}; INJECTION_PROOF instruction present in every stdout branch with substituted rank+range; hooks deny subagent writes to /tmp/claude-bulk-* paths; session summary is chronological timeline ≤15 lines
expected.source: User verbatim requirement (this session) + codex adversarial review

evidence.gap: Cycle-total positive cap +5 not enforced (current max +11 to +15); no echo contract for injection (consumption unverified); session summary lacks timeline format; bulk auth gate is forgeable without hook layer

reference_source.description: Verbatim user requirement (this session) + Read of all named source files + codex adversarial review (this session)
reference_source.url_or_location: User prompt (this session); scripts/score-update.sh; scripts/score-inject.sh; scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py; commands/commit.md; commands/close.md; codex output at /var/tmp/codex-outputs/codex-output-3168070-1779656127.txt
reference_source._role_table_note: No CLAUDE.md role table applies — this is a harness/infrastructure cycle, not a UI-token cycle.

attempts.proposed_solution: Rebalance EVENT_DELTAS so max positive per event = +5 per agent; switch rating from AskUserQuestion to <options> XML; add 5-bucket session summary; fix changelog-analyst BULK=false bug; add cross-session isolation.
attempts.actual_change: AC-01 set close_success_qa_pass={dev:5, ba:3, qa:3} = +11 cycle-total across agents; rating UX <options> shipped; session summary 5-bucket free-form shipped; bulk-commit Phase 2 candidate-set fix shipped.
attempts.outcome: 4 of 5 user-need items resolved at the per-agent level; the scoring item resolved AGENT-MAX-DELTA but not CYCLE-TOTAL — user clarification this cycle reveals the misread.

novelty_check.rationale: Prior cycle treated each issue as data-only (L3). This cycle adds L4 enforcement: M2 adds a JSON echo contract + tests (logic); M4 adds hook-level path guards (logic) on top of the auth-flag check (data). The scoring numbers themselves also change (data correction).

context.codebase_state: Working tree dirty per git status snapshot in dispatch prompt; relevant edits to hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh and hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh already in progress.
context.recent_commits: aea75d9 chore(docs): ship cycle 20260522-000000 close-report and QA verification; 5771880 feat(spec): commit spec-20260520-221059 and split views to git (arch-2); af96c61 fix(infra): M1-M4 gitignore exceptions, install mirror, uncapped_delta (cycle 20260522-000000); 1a1d058 feat(dev-cycle): Cycle 2 remediation; 50f2ca2 fix(agents): tighten style-inspector summary

development_approach.strategy: L3 data corrections for M1 score values + stale comments; L4 logic additions for M2 (script + agents + tests with 4-field echo contract per OBJ-01), M3 (template rewrite), M4 (script + command + hooks + cleanup with try/finally observation-time unlink per OBJ-05). Iter 2: M1 MANDATES Path A only (Path B removed per OBJ-04). M2 contract requires FOUR JSON fields (rank_acknowledged, range_acknowledged, recent_events_digest_acknowledged, score_injection_action) to prove read AND act per OBJ-01. M4 enforcement at THREE layers (script + command + hook); AC-04(g) split into orchestrator-context script test and synthetic-payload hook unit test per OBJ-02. M5 spec-continue verification (AC-05 new in iter 2 per OBJ-03) requires either a test-mode env var trace marker or a side-effect trace JSON file.
development_approach.validation_approach: Per AC: AC-01 = static read of EVENT_DELTAS + cycle-scenario sum check (PRIMARY: explicit per-scenario sum <= 5) + per-event positive sweep (GUARD: every positive event's cross-agent sum <= 5) + full 20-entry negative-delta enumeration check + grep for stale delta comments at dev.md:897,898,1151-1152 and close.md:415,416; AC-02 = test-inject-branches.sh against three fixture scores files (with INDEPENDENT sha256 recomputation per codex finding #1) + runtime-verify.sh against qa-report-20260524-205206.json (validates 4 JSON fields, rejects placeholder action values, recomputes digest); AC-03 = read commands/close.md timeline-region and verify template mandates timeline format with named source; AC-04 = (g.script) orchestrator-context script-gate test executed by main agent only with evidence artifact captured for QA validation + (g.hook) synthetic-payload unit test executed by QA subagent directly against hook scripts + grep hook files for deny patterns + verify session-Stop cleanup; AC-05 (NEW per OBJ-03 + codex #5) = Phase A blocked-bulk runtime test (no Step-7 marker) + Phase B real end-to-end non-bulk fallback commit chain in synthetic repo (real commit + push-gate token + Step-7 marker observable via trace mechanism).

_risk_level_doc: high = touches scoring infrastructure (cross-cutting), commit privilege gate (security-relevant), agent prompt contracts (cross-cutting), and hook policy (security-relevant). Triggers test-writer dispatch.

iter_2_round.feedback_summary: Codex iter-2 surfaced 9 findings (3 blockers, 4 majors, 2 minors). All in-scope per user-need fidelity check. All 9 applied: (#1) AC-02 gameability — required independent sha256 recomputation + 20-char min + reject placeholder action values; (#2) AC-04(g.script) wrapper bypass was hook-discipline violation — removed; main-agent-only execution with QA validating captured evidence; (#3) AC-05 stubbed Phase B option removed — real e2e commit required; (#4) AC-05 deferral_clause tightened — ac_deviation_allowed=false + external user-consent artifact required; (#5) context.json R7 still showed iter-1 'implicit via AC-04' classification — updated to map R7 → AC-05 + validation_approach updated; (#6) M1 false guarantee — per-event sweep is GUARD only, cycle-scenario sum is PRIMARY check; (#7) M4.3 main-agent exemption was a real loophole — extended hook deny to ALL model tool calls regardless of agent_id, only human-terminal can create flag; AC-04 g.script setup pivoted to env-var path override; g_hook_5 case flipped from allow to deny; (#8) try/finally wording was contradictory (finally runs AFTER try) — fixed to unlink-immediately-at-observation-BEFORE-write semantics; (#9) negative-delta wording clarified to scope preservation to negative-VALUED entries only.

findings.issue: AC-02 gameability — digest copyable from text, 10-char min allows 'no action needed'
findings.proposed_fix: Require independent sha256 recomputation; min 20 chars; reject placeholder values
findings.rationale: Real strengthening — iter-2-pre-codex contract proved 'read' weakly; iter-2-post-codex contract genuinely proves 'act'

findings.issue: AC-04(g.script) wrapper-strips-agent_id was hook-discipline violation
findings.proposed_fix: Remove wrapper option; main-agent-only execution with QA validating captured evidence
findings.rationale: Wrapper bypass would have circumvented Subagent Hook Discipline (CLAUDE.md §🛡️)

findings.issue: AC-05 stubbed Phase B option weakened OBJ-03
findings.proposed_fix: Require real end-to-end commit; mark stub as supplemental only
findings.rationale: OBJ-03 intent was full chain verification; stub option defeated that

findings.issue: AC-05 deferral_clause was escape hatch
findings.proposed_fix: ac_deviation_allowed=false; require external user-consent artifact citation
findings.rationale: Self-deferral by dev could defeat OBJ-03

findings.issue: context.json R7 still showed iter-1 classification
findings.proposed_fix: Update R7 → AC-05 + validation_approach to include AC-05
findings.rationale: Internal consistency across 3 artifacts

findings.issue: M1 per-event sweep falsely claimed as guarantee
findings.proposed_fix: Cycle-scenario sum is PRIMARY; per-event sweep is GUARD only
findings.rationale: Math: capping N events at +5 each only bounds cycle-total at N*5, not 5

findings.issue: M4.3 main-agent exemption was a real loophole
findings.proposed_fix: Deny ALL model tool writes regardless of agent_id; only human terminal can create flag
findings.rationale: User said '只要用户不使用commit bulk' — means user (not any model role) is the only one who can authorize

findings.issue: try/finally wording was contradictory (BEFORE attempting write + finally block)
findings.proposed_fix: Unlink immediately at observation, BEFORE the write attempt — no try/finally needed
findings.rationale: Clean unlink-first semantics match user intent and are simpler

findings.issue: Negative-delta preservation wording vs enumeration mismatch
findings.proposed_fix: Scope wording to negative-VALUED entries only (not zero companions)
findings.rationale: Matches actual enumeration; reduces ambiguity

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex flagged: (1) M1 per-event cap is not cycle-total cap; (2) stale delta comments in commands/dev.md and a generated test file; (3) M2 must use real JSON fields (jq-verifiable), not plain text; (4) M2 BA/Dev are dispatched before patch lands — runtime proof must scope to QA + future cycles; (5) M2 rank-only entropy too low — add range; (6) M2 all three score-inject stdout branches must emit contract; (7) M4 /tmp flag is forgeable without hook-level guard; (8) M4 global SID fallback widens authorization (out-of-scope this cycle); (9) M4 stale flag reuse — make single-use; (10) M4 don't broadly block --bulk substring; (11) M3 source ambiguity — name the user-requirement doc explicitly.

findings.issue: M1 per-event cap vs cycle-total cap
findings.proposed_fix: Rename AC to per-positive-event OR implement per-task accumulator clamping cycle-total to +5
findings.rationale: User verbatim says 'cycle total ≤ +5'; per-event cap alone fails the user requirement

findings.issue: M1 stale references in commands/dev.md:897, :1151-1152 and tests/generated test file
findings.proposed_fix: Update those comments + test or document supersession
findings.rationale: Required for internal consistency; AC-01 now covers them

findings.issue: M1 event-level claim correct
findings.rationale: Confirms the per-event sums in proposed table are ≤ +5

findings.issue: M2 rank_acknowledged: <rank> is not valid JSON
findings.proposed_fix: Use real JSON field, jq-verifiable
findings.rationale: M2.1/M2.2 now require '"rank_acknowledged": "<value>"' string fields

findings.issue: M2 circular proof for BA/Dev this cycle
findings.proposed_fix: Scope runtime proof to roles dispatched after patch (QA + future) + static fixture test for script side
findings.rationale: M2.3 + M2.4 split the proof; AC-02 limits runtime check to QA artifact

findings.issue: M2 rank-only entropy too low
findings.proposed_fix: Add range_acknowledged companion field (or digest of recent events)
findings.rationale: Added range_acknowledged to M2.1/M2.2/M2.3/M2.4

findings.issue: M2 all score-inject branches must emit contract
findings.proposed_fix: Update normal + missing-file fallback + malformed-file fallback
findings.rationale: AC-02(a) requires every stdout branch

findings.issue: M4 /tmp flag forgeable by agents
findings.proposed_fix: Hook-level deny for subagent writes to /tmp/claude-bulk-* paths
findings.rationale: M4.3 + AC-04(d) cover hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh and hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh

findings.issue: M4 global SID fallback in pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:465-488
findings.proposed_fix: Bind sentinel acceptance to authorized user session/flag
findings.rationale: User did not request privilege-guard restructuring this cycle; the auth-flag closes the immediate threat; logged in out_of_scope_observations

findings.issue: M4 stale auth flag reuse
findings.proposed_fix: Consume/unlink on bulk-sentinel write + reap at Stop
findings.rationale: M4.1 single-use unlink + M4.4 session-Stop reap

findings.issue: M4 do not block text --bulk broadly
findings.proposed_fix: Block operational paths only
findings.rationale: M4.5 explicit non-goal; hooks target /tmp/claude-bulk-* paths only

findings.issue: M3 source ambiguity
findings.proposed_fix: Name docs/dev/user-requirement-<id>.md as primary source
findings.rationale: AC-03(c) names the source explicitly

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All blocker and major findings applied to the spec, ACs, and context. One finding logged as out_of_scope_observation (M4 global SID fallback). One observation_only finding confirmed the per-event sums.
